# Q2 2023 Digital Trust Index: AI & Automation

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Download our Q2 2023 Digital Trust & Safety Index report to discover:

*   Why advancements in AI are leading to an influx of sophisticated social engineering scams
*   How fraud is becoming more democratized with fraud-as-a-service schemes centered around automation, particularly bots using one-time password (OTP) SMS
*   Why an increase in social engineering scams is leading to a jump in downstream fraud, including account takeover attacks
*   How businesses can take control of evolving threats with proactive fraud prevention

See Report
